data.title: Top marketing leaders expect high AI-driven disruption in industries with different levels of risk. News, travel, auto marketplaces, and retail are most exposed, with auto OEMs, fintech, financial services, media/streaming, and social media at lowest risk.
data.description: A recent Consumer AI Disruption Index produced by BCG and Moloco highlights the industries most susceptible to disruption. The findings indicate that the News, Travel, Auto Marketplaces, and Retail sectors are at the highest risk of being disrupted. Conversely, Auto OEMs, Fintech, Financial Services, Media/Streaming, and Social industries are deemed to be at lower risk. The report, released on January 21, 2026, in Boston, presents valuable insights into the potential impact of AI on various sectors.

data.title: Organizations are harnessing AI, broadening access by 50% in 1 year. Transitioning from pilots to enterprise scaling.
data.description: In Davos, Switzerland, on January 21, 2026, it was reported that there has been a significant development in the field of artificial intelligence (AI). Companies are now transitioning from initial testing phases to full-scale integration of AI within their enterprises, marking a notable shift. Over the span of just one year, businesses have expanded employee access to AI by a striking 50%. This growth has been substantial, with the percentage of workers utilizing AI technologies growing from less than 40% to approximately 60%. This trend indicates a significant increase in the adoption and implementation of AI across various industries.
Morgan Stanley expects that TSMC alone will spend close to $60 billion in capex next year.

data.title: Noble's blockchain moves from Cosmos to unveil an independent EVM for stablecoin-centric blockchain, launching in March.
data.description: Noble aims to enhance developer access and implement a stronger tech stack for its upcoming blockchain, dedicated to stablecoin and compatible with EVM. The launch is scheduled for March, emphasizing the importance of attracting developers and upgrading technical infrastructure for this project.

data.title: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong congratulates pro-crypto governors Abigail Spanberger & Mikie Sherrill, calling it a milestone moment for advocates.
data.description: Coinbase Global Inc.'s CEO, Brian Armstrong, commended the inaugurations of Abigail Spanberger as Governor of Virginia and Mikie Sherrill as Governor of New Jersey, seeing it as a victory for supporters of cryptocurrency. Armstrong congratulated the new governors in a social media post, marking this as a significant moment for pro-cryptocurrency advocates in positions of power. He mentioned it as another step forward for those supportive of crypto taking office, expressing his admiration for their stance. Spanberger, who had an intricate history with crypto policy, notably secured her victory in the previous year. The blockchain leader appreciated the increasing presence of pro-cryptocurrency figures in political offices nationwide, illustrating a positive trend for the industry.

data.title: TGR Haas F1 Team unveils VF-26 car for 2026 season, enters new phase of collaboration with Zoomex.
data.description: In the city of Victoria, the capital of Seychelles, the TGR Haas F1 Team introduced its latest race car, the VF-26, on January 19, 2026, marking the start of the 2026 season. This unveiling not only showcased the new vehicle but also highlighted the deepening collaboration between Zoomex and TGR Haas F1 Team. The partnership between the two entities has now entered a more advanced stage, signifying a step forward in their joint efforts within the racing domain.

data.title: New guidelines for elderly and disabled customers rolled out by HKMA and HKAB in Hong Kong to support silver economy.
data.description: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) and the Hong Kong Association of Banks (HKAB) have introduced new banking guidelines aimed at assisting elderly customers and individuals with disabilities. This initiative is part of Hong Kong's efforts to promote its silver economy, focusing on the needs of its aging population. The guidelines are designed to enhance the banking experience for these specific demographics and provide them with better access to financial services. This move signifies a step forward in addressing the unique requirements of elderly and disabled individuals in the banking sector.

data.title: Chainlink integrates data feeds for US equities to enable 24-hour trading of stocks and ETFs through blockchain.
data.description: Numerous crypto companies and traditional exchanges are quickly moving to provide 24/7 trading for stocks and ETFs using technology based on blockchain. This allows traders to access these assets at all times, representing a significant shift in the trading landscape. The move towards continuous trading is gaining traction, with a notable increase in interest and demand for such services. This move is making stocks and ETFs more accessible and offering more flexibility to investors. The growing trend towards blockchain technology in the financial sector is reshaping how traditional assets are traded.
